ecdpm.title: Sustainability of the SME business ecosystem: The missing links to access finance
ecdpm.excerpt: Although some successful businesses  have emerged, they remain isolated and limited to specific sectors. The challenge remains: how can SMEs and start-ups align their  products and services to the market, develop a viable business  model and grow and scale up? Improving the viability of SMEs and start-ups would significantly  advance their role in regional integration, fulfilling the African  Cont…

tips.title: Localising vanadium battery production for South Africa's energy security
tips.excerpt: Another potential  approach adopted by international entities seeking entry into the VRFB market is the acquisition of  an existing OEM. However, acquiring a company alone may not be sufficient to establish local  manufacturing capacity, thus it may be necessary to explore alternative options (Rebel Group and  TIPS).

policy_center.title: Morocco Emergence in Global Value Chains: Four exemplary industries
policy_center.excerpt: Morocco Emergence in Global Value Chains: Four exemplary industries Policy Paper  -  N° 07/22  -  Avril 2022 32 The challenge of  shared value •	 Certain growth potential requires  better  integration  of  social  and environmental dimensions  (transforming  societal  threats  into opportunities). •	 Offer  additional  sustainable  products and services. •	 Act on social acceptability.
